_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: Importantly, Stat3 protein was absent in flow cytometry-sorted EGFP+ SCPs and SCs from Stat3 fl/fl;Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre,EGFP+ mice
details: Stat3 protein was absent in flow cytometry-sorted EGFP+ SCPs and SCs from Stat3 fl/fl;Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre mice
